keyFactors: Brazil and Morocco have never played against each other, indicating unfamiliarity between the teams.
Morocco holds a higher Elo rating and superior recent form, potentially giving them a competitive edge.
The match is played at a neutral venue, eliminating any potential home advantage.
Brazil has a longer rest period since their last match but similar conditions apply to Morocco.
risks: Brazil's historical strength as a football nation may not be captured fully in current statistics.
Morocco's strong defensive record and higher Elo rating could be challenged by Brazil's attacking capabilities.
Recent disruptions or internal issues (not mentioned in material news) could impact either team's performance unexpectedly.

prediction.rationale: Beide Modelle sind sich weitgehend einig. Ausschlaggebend: Marokko hat klar höheres Elo (1839 vs 1698) und überragende gewichtete Form (2.585 vs 1.791); Defensive Stärke Marokkos: nur 0.274 Gegentore im Schnitt und 70.6% Clean-Sheet-Rate; Marokko mit höherer Offensivproduktion (2.011 vs 1.814 Tore/Spiel).
